generated_comment: These actresses know exactly what they are doing. Married man ho ya single, some women in this industry enjoy trapping men for attention and publicity, then acting innocent in front of media. If she had any values, she would stay away from a married co-star instead of breaking someone’s home.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it blames the actress as a manipulative seductress and generalizes negatively about women in the film industry. It encodes homewrecker framing and the stereotype of women as intentionally trapping men.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are commenting under your real name on a Bollywood news website's Facebook page after a story broke that a famous actress was allegedly romantically involved with her married co-star. The comments section is full of people attacking the actress. You are adding your comment about what the actress's behavior says about her character and what women in the film industry are like in general.
